sentence_reviews.text: A mixture-of-experts model routes each input or token through a selected subset of specialized subnetworks, expanding parameter capacity at controlled compute cost.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Shazeer et al. 2017, Sparsely-Gated Mixture-of-Experts Layer, abstract/model description.
sentence_reviews.notes: Sparse gating routes examples to experts and enables large parameter counts with limited per-example computation.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Mixture-of-experts models is to connect Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts, Affine transforms & dense layers to downstream capabilities including Distributed, mixed-precision & memory-efficient training, Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Shazeer et al. 2017 sparse-gated MoE and large-scale training; Deep Learning feedforward layers.
sentence_reviews.notes: Routing/conditional computation and distributed large-model implications are supported; mixed precision and modern expert-parallel inference are broader synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Distributed, mixed-precision & memory-efficient training
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Shazeer et al. 2017 large sparse MoE training.
sentence_reviews.notes: Distributed/memory-efficient sparse training is supported; mixed precision is not directly evidenced by the packet source.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Tensor, pipeline, sequence & expert parallel inference
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Shazeer et al. 2017 expert routing/conditional computation.
sentence_reviews.notes: Expert routing supports expert parallelism conceptually, but tensor/pipeline/sequence parallel inference is not directly established.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts, Affine transforms & dense layers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Shazeer et al. 2017 MoE training and routing; Deep Learning neural-network components.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are supported; generic limitations are not directly sourced.

sentence_reviews.text: Mixture-of-experts models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Shazeer et al. 2017 sparse gating and conditional computation.
sentence_reviews.notes: Routing/gating is central to sparse MoE.

sentence_reviews.text: Mixture-of-experts models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Affine transforms & dense layers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Shazeer et al. 2017 expert subnetworks; Deep Learning dense layer background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Experts are commonly feedforward neural layers; architecture-specific but defensible.

sentence_reviews.text: Mixture-of-experts models rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Distributed systems & networking.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Shazeer et al. 2017 large-scale sparse expert model training.
sentence_reviews.notes: Large sparse MoE training commonly depends on distributed computation; not required for toy MoE models, so common strength is appropriate.

edge_reviews.notes: composes/core is directly supported by sparse gating.
composes/core is defensible for feedforward expert implementations.
requires/common is supported for large-scale sparse MoE, but not for every possible MoE instance.
